# `library_codex.convolution.FormalPowerSeries`

FPS四則演算・inv/log/exp/pow・Taylor shift・一括積。

- 計算量の目安: 主要演算 $O(N\log N)$
- source: [`convolution/FormalPowerSeries.py`](../../../convolution/FormalPowerSeries.py)
- 公開API: function 19、class 0、method/property 0（Python protocol 0を含む）

## Import

```python
from library_codex.convolution.FormalPowerSeries import (
    fps_shrink,
    shrink,
    fps_add,
    fps_subtract,
    fps_negate,
    fps_multiply,
    fps_derivative,
    fps_integral,
    fps_evaluate,
    fps_inverse,
    fps_logarithm,
    fps_exponential,
    fps_power,
    fps_square_root,
    fps_quotient,
    fps_divmod,
    fps_remainder,
    fps_taylor_shift,
    fps_product,
)
```

| 定数 | 値 | source |

| `DEFAULT_MOD` | `998244353` | [L7](../../../convolution/FormalPowerSeries.py#L7) |
